errors.accountDisabled: Your account has been suspended, contact your manager for further information. Reason: {{reason}}
errors.authError: An error occurred while trying to log in.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid login credentials. Please try again.
errors.noConnectedAccount: This account is not yet linked to a login method.
errors.oauthError: An issue occurred while using OAuth2.1.
errors.providerDisabled: This login method is inactive. Please try another login method.
errors.rateLimit: Woah! Take it easy! You're going too fast. Please try again in a few seconds.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.bannedUser: Your account has been suspended, contact your manager for further information. Reason: {{reason}}
